text: nothing....I think I am getting worse! I dont know what else to write, I just dont get better!..I am so dissappointed, I feel my eyes tired and dry easily, I get tired so fast and my lips are dry the whole day! upset stomach, nausea, fever twice a day DOXI 100 mg...plus face creams.. I wash my face carefully everyday, I exercise (jogging) but it is the same and even worse, my face gets red and have several bumps in my whole chics...hate it! :(
